CustomField.formula: CASE(Sede_Venta__r.Name, 'VASS Madrid', 'VASS Madrid', 'VASS Barcelona', 'VASS Barcelona', 'VASS PERÚ', 'VASS Peru', 'Nateevo Barcelona', 'Nateevo Barcelona', 'VASS CHILE', 'VASS Chile', 'VASS COLOMBIA', 'VASS Colombia', 'VASS MEXICO', 'VASS México', 'NATEEVO DIGITAL SLU', 'Nateevo Madrid', 'SERBATIC', 'Serbatic', 'T4S', 'T4S', 'VASS GERMANY', 'VASS Germany', 'VASS NEDERLAND B.V', 'VASS Nederland', 'NATEEVO M360', 'Nateevo Mexico', 'NATEEVO COLOMBIA', 'Nateevo Colombia', 'NATEEVO MÉXICO', 'Nateevo Mexico', 'VASS USA', 'VASS USA', 'Intelygenz USA', 'Intelygenz USA', 'Intelygenz Spain', 'Intelygenz España', 'VASS UK', 'VASS UK', 'CoPilot', 'CoPilot', 'VASS AUSTRALIA', 'VASS Australia', 'VASS CANADA', 'VASS Canada', 'VASS GREECE', 'VASS Greece', 'VASS LATVIA', 'VASS Latvia', 'VASS MALASIA', 'VASS Malasia', 'VASS North Macedonia', 'VASS Macedonia', 'VASS LUXEMBURG', 'VASS Luxemburg', 'VASS SWEDEN', 'VASS Sweden', 'VASS Switzerland', 'VASS Switzerland', 'VASS IT US', 'VASS IT US', 'VASS APJ', 'VASS APJ', 'VASS PORTUGAL', 'VASS Portugal', 'VASS ROMANIA', 'VASS Romania', 'VASS EU', 'VASS EU EMEA', 'Computer Resources International','VASS EU EMEA', 'VASS EU SERVICES FR','VASS EU EMEA', 'Inside Reality AG','Inside Reality AG', 'Zington AB','VASS Sweden', 'null' )
CustomField.label: GSO Sede
